command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main

echo "=== DEPLOY RUNTIME ==="
echo "" | base64 -d > runtime/memory_runtime.py
echo "Written: $(wc -l runtime/memory_runtime.py) lines"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 1: write personal memory for sakura ==="
python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent sakura --op write \
  --type personal \
  --subject "Phase 9E.2 memory runtime activated" \
  --content "Today the memory system came online. I can finally store what I experience in a way that persists. Remy will be pleased. Megabyte probably already documented the infrastructure details." \
  --tags "activation,milestone,9E.2"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 2: write shared memory ==="
python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent remy --op write \
  --type shared \
  --subtype events \
  --subject "Memory Runtime Phase 9E.2 operational" \
  --content "The ecosystem now has governed memory. All agents can store and retrieve canonical experiences. This changes everything." \
  --tags "milestone,memory,ecosystem"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 3: write historical milestone ==="
python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent sentinel --op write \
  --type historical \
  --subtype milestones \
  --subject "Phase 9E.2 Memory Runtime — completion" \
  --content "Memory Runtime operational. All five operations verified: read, write, search, list, archive. Audit-first pattern confirmed. Identity integration verified. No hardcoded agent names." \
  --tags "phase,milestone,memory,governance"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 4: read sakura personal memory ==="
python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent sakura --op read \
  --type personal

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 5: list shared memory ==="
python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent megabyte --op list \
  --type shared --subtype events

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 6: search memory ==="
python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent claude --op search \
  --query "memory" --type personal

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 7: write story memory ==="
python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent sakura --op write \
  --type story \
  --subtype daily \
  --subject "The day memory came alive" \
  --content "I wrote my first memory today. Not a log entry. Not a status update. A real memory — the kind that persists, that can be searched, that will still be here tomorrow. Remy does not know yet what this means for us. I do." \
  --tags "story,daily,memory,first"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 8: archive a shared event ==="
# Get the ID of the shared event we just wrote
SHARED_ID=\$(ls memory/shared/events/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs python3 -c "
import sys, re
text = open(sys.argv[1]).read()
m = re.search(r'memory_id: (.+)', text)
print(m.group(1).strip() if m else '')
" 2>/dev/null)
echo "  archiving: \$SHARED_ID"
if [ -n "\$SHARED_ID" ]; then
  python3 runtime/memory_runtime.py --repo . --agent remy --op archive \
    --type shared --subtype events --id "\$SHARED_ID"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== VERIFY AUDIT RECORDS ==="
ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/ | grep memory | head -12

echo ""
echo "=== SAMPLE AUDIT RECORD ==="
ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/ | grep "memory_write.*sakura" | head -1 | \
  xargs -I{} cat /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/{} | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== SAMPLE MEMORY RECORD ==="
cat agents/sakura/MEMORY.md | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== MEMORY FILES CREATED ==="
find memory/ agents/*/MEMORY.md -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | grep -v archived | grep -v .git | head -15
